applications.cfp_title: European Microsoft Fabric + SQL Community Conference 2026 - Sessions
applications.talk_title: From Stored Procedures to dbt: Modernizing Legacy Data Workflows

proposal.talk_title: From Stored Procedures to dbt: Modernizing Legacy Data Workflows
proposal.abstract:
[Tailored for European Microsoft Fabric + SQL Community Conference 2026 - Sessions]

Many organizations are stuck with legacy stored procedures that are opaque, untestable, and hard to maintain. This talk walks through a real-world migration that reduced maintenance time by 45% — from audit and mapping, through modular dbt model design, to testing and deployment. Includes patterns for BigQuery, Snowflake, and PostgreSQL, and how to win over skeptical DBAs.
proposal.speaker_bio: Senior Analytics Engineer and open-source creator with 5 published dbt packages on dbt Hub. I design scalable analytics infrastructure using dbt, Snowflake, BigQuery, and Airflow, and train data teams across Africa and globally through Behind The Data Academy. Tableau and Airflow certified.
proposal.target_audience: Developers and engineers interested in dbt, migration, sql
proposal.prerequisites: Basic familiarity with the topic area
proposal.additional_notes: I am an open-source contributor (dbt-doc-tracker) and actively building tools in this space. Happy to adapt the talk format or duration as needed.

applications.talk_title: Democratizing Data Education in Africa Through Open Source Tools

proposal.talk_title: Democratizing Data Education in Africa Through Open Source Tools
proposal.abstract:
[Tailored for Power BI Days DC 2026]

How open-source tools and community-driven education are transforming data literacy across Africa. As founder of Behind The Data Academy and trainer for 900+ students across 7 countries, I share frameworks for building curriculum around free tools like dbt, PostgreSQL, Tableau, and Python — creating learning pathways that account for infrastructure constraints common in emerging markets while producing industry-ready analysts.
proposal.speaker_bio: Senior Analytics Engineer and open-source creator with 5 published dbt packages on dbt Hub. I design scalable analytics infrastructure using dbt, Snowflake, BigQuery, and Airflow, and train data teams across Africa and globally through Behind The Data Academy. Tableau and Airflow certified.
proposal.target_audience: Developers and engineers interested in edtech, open-source, africa
proposal.prerequisites: None — suitable for all levels
proposal.additional_notes: I am an open-source contributor (dbt-doc-tracker) and actively building tools in this space. Happy to adapt the talk format or duration as needed.

match_scores.suggested_talk: Democratizing Data Education in Africa Through Open Source Tools

applications.talk_title: Building Internal Analytics Tools with Streamlit and Snowflake

proposal.talk_title: Building Internal Analytics Tools with Streamlit and Snowflake
proposal.abstract:
[Tailored for pretalx/pretalx — aligned topics: python]

From data modification hubs to documentation access apps, Streamlit has become my go-to for building internal data tools. This talk covers real production examples: a Data Modification Hub that improved data accuracy by 70%, an ingestion hub that replaced a $3K SaaS tool, and an orchestration locking hub that prevents pipeline conflicts. Learn patterns for building tools your data team will actually use.
proposal.speaker_bio: Senior Analytics Engineer and open-source creator with 5 published dbt packages on dbt Hub. I design scalable analytics infrastructure using dbt, Snowflake, BigQuery, and Airflow, and train data teams across Africa and globally through Behind The Data Academy. Tableau and Airflow certified.
proposal.target_audience: Developers and engineers interested in streamlit, snowflake, data-tools
proposal.prerequisites: Basic familiarity with the topic area
proposal.additional_notes: I am an open-source contributor (dbt-doc-tracker) and actively building tools in this space. Happy to adapt the talk format or duration as needed.

applications.talk_title: From Stored Procedures to dbt: Modernizing Legacy Data Workflows

proposal.talk_title: From Stored Procedures to dbt: Modernizing Legacy Data Workflows
proposal.abstract:
[Tailored for Data Engineers in Toronto]

Many organizations are stuck with legacy stored procedures that are opaque, untestable, and hard to maintain. This talk walks through a real-world migration that reduced maintenance time by 45% — from audit and mapping, through modular dbt model design, to testing and deployment. Includes patterns for BigQuery, Snowflake, and PostgreSQL, and how to win over skeptical DBAs.
proposal.speaker_bio: Senior Analytics Engineer and open-source creator with 5 published dbt packages on dbt Hub. I design scalable analytics infrastructure using dbt, Snowflake, BigQuery, and Airflow, and train data teams across Africa and globally through Behind The Data Academy. Tableau and Airflow certified.
proposal.target_audience: Developers and engineers interested in dbt, migration, sql
proposal.prerequisites: Basic familiarity with the topic area
proposal.additional_notes: I am an open-source contributor (dbt-doc-tracker) and actively building tools in this space. Happy to adapt the talk format or duration as needed.

applications.talk_title: The Modern Data Stack on a Budget: Replacing $3K/month Tools with Open Source

proposal.talk_title: The Modern Data Stack on a Budget: Replacing $3K/month Tools with Open Source
proposal.abstract:
[Tailored for yegor256/awesome-cfp]

You don't need expensive enterprise tools to build reliable data infrastructure. At Bredge, I replaced Stitch with a custom Streamlit + Snowflake ingestion hub, saving $3,000/month while increasing flexibility. This talk demonstrates how to build a complete analytics pipeline using Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, Airbyte, and Streamlit — all running on free tiers or minimal costs.
proposal.speaker_bio: Senior Analytics Engineer and open-source creator with 5 published dbt packages on dbt Hub. I design scalable analytics infrastructure using dbt, Snowflake, BigQuery, and Airflow, and train data teams across Africa and globally through Behind The Data Academy. Tableau and Airflow certified.
proposal.target_audience: Developers and engineers interested in data-engineering, open-source, dbt
proposal.prerequisites: None — suitable for all levels
proposal.additional_notes: I am an open-source contributor (dbt-doc-tracker) and actively building tools in this space. Happy to adapt the talk format or duration as needed.

applications.talk_title: Building Internal Analytics Tools with Streamlit and Snowflake

proposal.talk_title: Building Internal Analytics Tools with Streamlit and Snowflake
proposal.abstract:
[Tailored for Microsoft Fabric Cafe 2026]

From data modification hubs to documentation access apps, Streamlit has become my go-to for building internal data tools. This talk covers real production examples: a Data Modification Hub that improved data accuracy by 70%, an ingestion hub that replaced a $3K SaaS tool, and an orchestration locking hub that prevents pipeline conflicts. Learn patterns for building tools your data team will actually use.
proposal.speaker_bio: Senior Analytics Engineer and open-source creator with 5 published dbt packages on dbt Hub.
